title: Efficacy and Safety of Ivabradine on Top of Atenolol in Stable Angina Pectoris
text:
Summary: To test whether ivabradine when given in combination with atenolol is able to improve the exercise tolerance of patients with stable angina pectoris
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Chronic stable angina pectoris 

 Documented coronary artery disease 

 Previous treatment with atenolol or other beta-blocker agent 

 Exercise tolerance test positivity and stability 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Heart rate < 60 bpm 

 Congestive heart failure
